lastSession.summary: v10.0.0: Separate marketplace, native plugin updates, repo restructure, cross-platform hooks
completedTasks: Restructured plugin repo (moved claude-harness/* to root)
Created run-hook.cmd polyglot wrapper, renamed hooks to extensionless
Removed all custom update infrastructure from session-start hook (~100 lines)
Removed .plugin-version stamp from setup.sh, replaced with artifact-based migrations
nextSteps: Address pending features in active.json (feature-001 through feature-007)
